# Wellness & Healthy LifeStyle Club (WHLC)

> Gut-health-focused member app: local email profile, saved recipe favorites, gut-friendly recipes with nutrition notes, free 5-Day Gut Reset, $7 Gut Reset Protocol, and a weekly newsletter.

WHLC publishes a new gut-friendly recipe and a wellness article every week. Content emphasizes real food, fiber, fermented foods, and the gut microbiome — practical, no hype, no fabricated claims.

## Recipes
- [Gut-Healing Overnight Oats with Berries & Chia](https://app.healthyfoodrecipesclub.com/recipes/gut-healing-overnight-oats/): 5-minute no-cook breakfast with oats, chia, flax and kefir for fiber and live cultures.

## Start here
- [5-Day Gut Reset (free)](https://payhip.com/b/JUc5F)
- [Gut Reset Protocol ($7)](https://healthyfoodrecipesclub.com/b/ezP49)
- [Weekly newsletter](https://app.healthyfoodrecipesclub.com/#newsletter)
- [Instagram @healthyfoodrecipesclub](https://instagram.com/healthyfoodrecipesclub)

## About
WHLC (Wellness & Healthy LifeStyle Club) is a wellness brand helping people improve gut health through real food and daily habits.
